descriptionShort: Jim Robson and Orland Kurtenbach discuss the making of Vancouver Canucks captains in this 2025 feature interview.
descriptionLong: A 2025 feature interview with legendary Vancouver Canucks broadcaster Jim Robson and former captain Orland Kurtenbach exploring the history and selection process of Canucks team captains. While not directly focused on the 1987 Richmond Sockeyes, this archival content may include retrospective commentary relevant to alumni who went on to professional careers.
